Contact Us

Send us your export inquiry, product requirement, or request for samples. We respond within 24 hours.

Send Export Inquiry

Contact Information

Address

India

Email

info@shritikenterprises.com

Phone / WhatsApp

+91-XXXXXXXXXX

What to Include

  • Product name and grade (if known)
  • Required quantity (MT per month/year)
  • Destination country and port
  • Packaging preference
  • Certifications required (Halal, Kosher, etc.)
  • Any custom specifications

Response Time

We respond to all export inquiries within 24 business hours. For urgent inquiries, include your WhatsApp number.

Shritik Enterprises
LLP

India-based manufacturer and exporter of premium cashew kernels, dehydrated onion, garlic, and ginger. Serving worldwide export markets with certified, quality-focused food ingredients.
